date_notes: Smith's 'final' statement May 17 2023; Johnson won Lacombe-Ponoka May 29 2023 (~70%); caucus seating post-election (confirm exact date from R-058).
title_en: Party leader states candidate 'will not sit in caucus — that is final'; candidate wins and is later seated
title_fr: La chef du parti déclare qu'une candidate « ne siégera pas au caucus — c'est définitif »; la candidate est élue puis admise
description_en: The UCP leader states that candidate Jennifer Johnson 'will not be sitting with the UCP caucus. And that is final.' Johnson had compared transgender children in schools to feces in a cookie-batter analogy in a September 2022 recording. Johnson wins the Lacombe-Ponoka riding on May 29 2023 with approximately 70% of the vote. The Legislative Assembly record confirms Johnson was subsequently seated in the UCP caucus, later resigned, and was later readmitted.

relations.note: Carry-forward from related_events — confirm relation type

verification_notes: Confirm exact caucus seating date from R-058 legislative record. CityNews election-night article recommended as future R-065.
